scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @securetracker/shared && npm run build -w @securetracker/shared && npm run typecheck -w @securetracker/backend && npm run typecheck -w @securetracker/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @securetracker/shared && npm run test -w @securetracker/backend && npm run test -w @securetracker/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w @securetracker/shared && npm run build -w @securetracker/backend && npm run build -w @securetracker/frontend
